title: Gracie McGonigal: From Doubt to Bridgerton Star
summary: Gracie McGonigal is an actor who was told she might not get many acting jobs because she has a disability—her arm stops below her elbow. But she didn't let that stop her. She loved acting since school and went to special arts schools to learn. Some people worried she wouldn't find roles, but Gracie kept trying. She even wore a fake hand in auditions at first, but a friend told her to be proud of her real arm. Now, she is in the popular Netflix show Bridgerton, proving that you can follow your dreams no matter what. Her story shows that being different can be a strength, and she encourages others to be themselves.

questions.question: What is the main message of Gracie's story?
options: You can achieve your dreams by being yourself

questions.correct_answer: You can achieve your dreams by being yourself

background_read: Gracie McGonigal is a young actor who was born with a limb difference, meaning her arm is shorter. She always wanted to act and went to special schools like the Brit School to learn. Some people in the acting world told her she might not get roles because of her disability, but she didn't listen. Instead, she worked hard and even changed how she presented herself in auditions. Now, she is successful in a famous TV show, showing that disabilities don't have to limit dreams. This story is about perseverance and self-acceptance in the entertainment industry.
Article_Structure: WHO: Gracie McGonigal, an actor with a limb difference
WHAT: She overcame doubts to star in Bridgerton
WHERE: In the UK, at schools and auditions, and on Netflix
WHY: To inspire others by showing that disabilities don't stop success

perspectives.description: Gracie faced negative comments but used them as motivation to succeed in acting.
